title: Isaiah 117 House Expands to Mecklenburg, Aids Foster Children
summary: Isaiah 117 House expands to Mecklenburg, offering a comforting alternative to institutional foster care intake, creating a supportive environment for children.
charlotte_impact: Provides vulnerable children a safe, nurturing entry into foster care, reducing trauma and improving their well-being during a difficult transition.

title: Coolest Day of the Week Before Warming Trend
